name: First Steps to Take After Getting Hurt on the Clock
description: First Steps to Take After Getting Hurt on the Clock - Murray

step.name: Step 1
step.text: So you got hurt at work; first, tell your supervisor immediately. Document exactly what happened and take photos of the scene if you can. Then, get to a doctor and make sure they know it happened on the clock. If the paperwork starts feeling like a second job or they stop paying your bills, give us a call at 801-746-0290 to get things back on track.
